target.title: feat: add nano-empire-tollbooth payment rail skill
target.body:
Adds Nano Empire Tollbooth payment rail to ClawHub.

**What this skill does:**
- Payment rails for AI agents with automatic x402 payment challenges
- HMAC-SHA256 verification with key rotation
- Cryptographic proof packs for every transaction
- Credit-based billing with 80/20 revenue split (dev gets 80%)
- 6 monetized skills live (AutoSales, TTS, Proxy, Proof, LongCat, x402 Debugger)

**Revenue Model:**
- Developer earns 80% of every call
- Nano Empire takes 20% toll
- Tiers: Starter 0/500, Builder 5/2500, Operator 50/10000

**Live Verification:**
- Tollbooth: http://147.5.105.20:8403/healthz
- Revenue: ,000+ CAD, 16+ transactions
- Tests: 132/132 passing (22 security tests)
- Marketplace: 6 skills live

**Integration:**


**No payment competition in ClawHub** - this is the first payment rail skill.
